scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: if [ -n "$RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT_ID" ]; then pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server build && mkdir -p dist && cp artifacts/api-server/dist/index.cjs dist/index.cjs; else pnpm -r --if-present run build; fi
scripts.verify:blocks: pnpm run verify:layout-variants && pnpm run verify:block-fields
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
